questionHtml:
Which instrument would best monitor the rate of this reaction?

2KI (aq) + Cl2 (aq) → 2KCl (aq) + I2 (aq)


A.  Balance

B.  Colorimeter

C.  Volumetric flask

D.  Gas syringe

meta.title: Which instrument would best monitor the rate of this reaction? 2KI (aq) + Cl2 (aq) → 2KCl (aq) + I2 (aq) A. Balance B. Colorimeter C. Volumetric flask D. Gas syringe
